# License: GPL-2.0-or-later
# License-URL: https://www.gnu.org/licenses/old-licenses/gpl-2.0.html

# Dukandar

> Dukandar is a WordPress plugin, marketing the open-source project wpmcp, that lets an AI assistant (Claude, Cursor, or any MCP client) build and run a WordPress or WooCommerce store. It speaks the Model Context Protocol over a standard application-password connection. Every tool that writes to the database routes through one safety engine: snapshot before the change, apply, verify, and roll back with one click if anything goes wrong, per operation or per whole agent session. Free and open, GPL-2.0.

## Get Started

- [Home](https://getdukandar.com/): Product overview, the undo model, and the free plugin
- [About](https://getdukandar.com/about.html): What Dukandar is, why the snapshot-first design exists, and who builds it
- [Documentation](https://getdukandar.com/docs.html): Installation, connecting AI clients over MCP, the safety model, and the full tools reference
- [Compare](https://getdukandar.com/dukandar-vs-other-wp-mcp-tools.html): Honest comparison against other WordPress and WooCommerce MCP tools

## The Safety Model

- Every mutating tool routes through a single orchestrator (`Safe_Mutation::run()`); no write path can bypass it.
- Snapshot captures the full post row, all post meta, taxonomy terms, and comments before a change, or the prior value for options, users, comments, and WooCommerce orders.
- A one-click restore reverts a single operation (`rollback-operation`) or an entire agent session (`rollback-session`), from the AI itself or a Restore button in wp-admin.
- Free tier keeps the last 20 operations in history; unlimited history is a planned Pro feature.

## What It Covers

- Content and pages, media, site and store settings, users, and comments
- WooCommerce products, orders, order status changes, and sales reports
- Navigation menus, plugins and themes, a read-mostly database and filesystem surface
- SEO metadata (title, description, focus keyword, canonical, robots) via Yoast SEO or Rank Math, undoable like any other write
- Read-only performance and security scanners
- A handful of deliberately risky paths (raw database writes, permanent file or package deletion) are off by default and honestly reported as not covered by the undo guarantee

## Key Facts

- Built on the open-source WordPress plugin `wpmcp`: https://github.com/fahdi/wpmcp
- License: GPL-2.0-or-later, free forever for the safety, save, and restore engine
- Requires WordPress 6.9+ and the WordPress Abilities API
- Uses the Model Context Protocol (MCP); works with Claude, Cursor, and other compatible AI clients
- No separate service or third party holding a copy of the store; runs as a single self-hosted WordPress plugin
- Author: Fahad Murtaza (https://isupercoder.com, https://github.com/fahdi)

## Not Yet Shipped

- Elementor deep editing (today the plugin only reads whether a page is built with Elementor)
- `preview-change`, a dry-run diff before a write applies
- Unlimited history / full-depth session rollback (planned Pro tier, gating mechanism already in place)

## Contact

- Email: info@fahdmurtaza.com
- GitHub: https://github.com/fahdi/wpmcp
